servicesPage.heroSubtitle: Four areas of expertise to cover all your technology needs, from design to deployment.

web.heroSubtitle: From landing pages to complex SaaS, we build fast, secure, SEO-optimized web applications.

features.title: Modern & responsive interfaces
features.description: Pixel-perfect design with Chakra UI and Framer Motion. Every interface is designed to deliver a smooth experience across all devices, from mobile to desktop.

features.title: Performance & speed
features.description: Next.js architecture with SSR/SSG, image optimization, lazy loading and code splitting. Loading time under 2 seconds guaranteed.

features.title: Native & advanced SEO
features.description: Dynamic metadata, JSON-LD, automatic sitemap, Open Graph. Your application is indexed and visible from day one.

features.title: Security & scalability
features.description: Robust authentication, CSRF/XSS protection, HTTPS. Serverless architecture that scales automatically with your growth.

processSteps.title: Discovery
processSteps.description: Needs analysis, existing system audit, requirements specification and goals definition.

processSteps.title: Design
processSteps.description: Figma mockups, interactive prototype, design system validation and technical architecture.

processSteps.title: Development
processSteps.description: 2-week agile sprints, regular demos, continuous integration and automated testing.

processSteps.title: Deployment
processSteps.description: Production deployment on Vercel, monitoring, training and post-launch technical support.

mobile.heroSubtitle: Smooth, high-performance iOS and Android apps with native design. One codebase, two platforms.

features.title: Cross-platform with React Native
features.description: One codebase for iOS and Android. 40% reduction in development time while maintaining a native experience on each platform.

features.title: App Store & Play Store deployment
features.description: We handle the entire publishing process: builds, certificates, screenshots, store listings and ASO optimization.

features.title: Offline-first & real-time
features.description: Offline synchronization, push notifications and real-time updates for an uninterrupted experience.

features.title: Smart push notifications
features.description: Targeted and segmented notifications to engage your users at the right time with the right message.

processSteps.title: Prototype
processSteps.description: MVP definition, wireframes and interactive Figma prototype to validate UX before development.

processSteps.title: Development
processSteps.description: 2-week sprints with test builds on TestFlight and Play Store beta for continuous feedback.

processSteps.title: Testing
processSteps.description: Testing on real devices, performance profiling, accessibility testing and bug fixing.

processSteps.title: Launch
processSteps.description: Store publishing, Crashlytics monitoring, analytics and post-launch iterations.

features.title: Conversational chatbots
features.description: WhatsApp and web chatbots powered by LLMs. RAG on your documents for precise and contextual answers, 24/7.

features.title: RAG & Knowledge bases
features.description: Semantic indexing and search on your internal documents. Your employees find information in seconds instead of minutes.

features.title: Computer Vision
features.description: Object detection, intelligent OCR, automated quality control. Transform your cameras into smart sensors.

features.title: Predictive analytics

processSteps.title: AI Audit
processSteps.description: Identification of high-impact use cases, feasibility assessment and expected ROI estimation.

processSteps.title: POC
processSteps.description: Proof of concept in 2-4 weeks to validate the solution on a limited scope with your real data.

processSteps.title: Production

processSteps.title: Optimization

performance.heroSubtitle: Load testing, application monitoring and performance audits to ensure the reliability and speed of your production systems.

features.title: Load & stress testing
features.description: Performance testing campaigns with Neoload: user load simulation, bottleneck identification and system capacity validation before production deployment.

features.title: APM & production monitoring
features.description: Dynatrace and AppDynamics setup for real-time application performance monitoring. Proactive anomaly detection and intelligent alerting.

features.title: IT performance audit
features.description: Complete analysis of your technical architecture, weakness identification and Go/No Go recommendations based on concrete data.

features.title: Optimization & governance
features.description: Operational reporting, performance committee and action plans to continuously improve the speed and reliability of your applications.

processSteps.title: Audit
processSteps.description: Technical architecture analysis, test scenario definition and expected performance threshold setting.

processSteps.title: Test campaign
processSteps.description: Scripting, load test and stress test execution on your environments with Neoload.

processSteps.title: Analysis & Go/No Go
processSteps.description: Detailed results analysis, bottleneck identification and argued Go/No Go recommendation.

processSteps.title: Continuous monitoring
processSteps.description: Production APM setup, monitoring dashboards and alerting for guaranteed long-term performance.

about.heroSubtitle: GMG Labs is a premium tech agency based in Casablanca. We build digital products that make a difference for Moroccan businesses and beyond.
storyParagraphs: GMG Labs was born from a simple observation: Morocco is full of tech talent, but lacks agencies capable of delivering products at international standards. We decided to change that.
Our first major project, Ello, became the leading beauty booking platform in Morocco. This success convinced us that we could replicate this level of excellence for other businesses.
Today, we support startups and large companies in their digital transformation with four areas of expertise: Web, Mobile, Artificial Intelligence and IT Performance.
about.teamSubtitle: Three complementary profiles uniting strategy, technology and performance.

cofounders.name: Kamil Alami
cofounders.description: Product Builder profile with 5+ years of experience in digital product design. From product strategy to development, including UX design and go-to-market. Expertise in generative AI and agile methodologies.

cofounders.name: Oualid Tebib
cofounders.description: Digital strategy and IT consultant with 8 years of experience supporting major groups (BNP, ENGIE, Saint-Gobain) in their transformation projects. Expert in application performance and IT architecture.

cofounders.name: Mehdi Essakalli
cofounders.description: Strategy and data profile with experience in Big Data R&D (MFG Labs) and digital transformation consulting for the State and major CAC 40 companies. Expertise in blockchain, AI and automation.
cofounders.formation: Sciences-Po Paris x LSE – Finance & Strategy

contact.heroSubtitle: Free discovery call with no commitment. Contact us directly.
contact.directContactSubtitle: Feel free to call us, send us an email or write to us on WhatsApp. We respond within 24 hours.

pricing.heroSubtitle: No surprises. Three clear plans to cover all types of projects, from business websites to enterprise solutions.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Ideal for small businesses that need a professional, SEO-optimized business website.

plans.name: Business
plans.description: For ambitious projects: web applications, e-commerce or SaaS platforms with advanced features.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Custom solutions for large projects: mobile apps, AI, load testing, complex architectures and dedicated teams.

faqItems.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqItems.answer: A business website takes 2 to 4 weeks. A complete web application, 2 to 4 months. A mobile app, 3 to 6 months. Every project is different, we'll give you a precise estimate during the first call.

faqItems.question: What are the payment terms?
faqItems.answer: We work in 3 installments: 40% at signing, 30% at midpoint and 30% at delivery. For Enterprise projects, terms are flexible and negotiable.

faqItems.question: Does the price include hosting?
faqItems.answer: The Starter plan includes 1 year of hosting on Vercel. For Business and Enterprise plans, we recommend and configure the optimal hosting (Vercel, AWS, or other) based on your needs.

faqItems.question: What happens after delivery?
faqItems.answer: Each plan includes a free support period (30 to 90 days). Beyond that, we offer monthly maintenance contracts starting at 2,000 MAD/month.

faqItems.question: Can you work with our existing technical team?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. We can work as reinforcement for your team, in managed services or project mode. We adapt to your tools and processes.

faqItems.question: Are the prices negotiable?
faqItems.answer: The displayed prices are base rates. The final price depends on the exact complexity of your project. We invite you to contact us for a free custom quote.

portfolio.heroSubtitle: Concrete projects with measurable results. Discover how we helped our clients achieve their goals.

ello.title: Ello - Beauty & Wellness Platform
ello.description: Complete booking and management platform for beauty professionals in Morocco. Ello connects clients with the best salons, institutes and freelancers, with a real-time booking system, online payment and smart agenda management.
ello.challenge: The Moroccan beauty market lacked a modern digital solution. Professionals still manage their appointments by phone and WhatsApp, causing no-shows and revenue loss.
ello.solution: We built a full-stack platform with a client app (web + mobile), a pro dashboard and an automatic WhatsApp reminder system. The serverless architecture with Supabase allows limitless scalability.

messidor-patrimoine.title: Messidor Patrimoine - Financial Dashboard
messidor-patrimoine.description: Wealth management and financial investment platform in Morocco. Complete dashboard with UCITS tracking, OPCI, investment simulator and real-time stock market monitoring.
messidor-patrimoine.challenge: Moroccan investors lacked a centralized tool to track their UCITS, OPCI and stock market investments with reliable and up-to-date data.
messidor-patrimoine.solution: Secure web dashboard with authentication, real-time UCITS and OPCI tracking, interactive investment simulator and stock market monitoring module.
results: Centralization of all investments in a single dashboard
Investment simulator used by hundreds of clients

ello-pro.title: Ello Pro - Salon Management Dashboard
ello-pro.shortDescription: SaaS management dashboard for beauty and wellness salons
ello-pro.description: Complete SaaS dashboard for beauty and wellness professionals. Ello Pro offers an interactive drag-and-drop planning, an AI chatbot for appointment booking, real-time notifications, a content creation studio with video editor, a talent recruitment portal and advanced analytics.
ello-pro.challenge: Salon managers in Morocco use fragmented tools (notebooks, WhatsApp, Excel) to manage their appointments, clients and teams. No local solution combines planning, analytics, content and AI in one tool.
ello-pro.solution: We developed an all-in-one dashboard with drag-and-drop planning, multi-service parallel management, AI chatbot capable of booking appointments in natural language, real-time notifications with sound alerts, and an integrated content studio for creating video reels directly in the browser.
results: Interactive planning with multi-service bundle management and parallel phases
AI chatbot with OpenAI for appointment booking, client management and business insights
Real-time notifications via Supabase Realtime with sound alerts
Content Studio with FFmpeg video editor and automatic reels generator
Talent recruitment portal (hairdressers, beauticians) with profile management
Analytics module with KPIs, charts and performance tracking
